message:
✨ Increase leaderboard refresh to 6x daily (every 4 hours) (#1269)

Run the generate-leaderboard workflow every 4 hours (02:00, 06:00,
10:00, 14:00, 18:00, 22:00 UTC) instead of once daily. Updated the
countdown timer to find the next 4-hour slot.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@ name: Generate Leaderboard Data
 
 on:
   schedule:
-    - cron: '0 6 * * *'  # Daily at 6am UTC
+    - cron: '0 2,6,10,14,18,22 * * *'  # Every 4 hours (6x daily)
   workflow_dispatch:       # Manual trigger
 
 permissions:
